raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS - A brown chest of drawers with a single visible drawer is on a wooden floor. The drawer has a front face and a handle. STRATEGY - First, reach and grasp the drawer handle to pull it open. Failure modes include misgrasping the handle or pulling too hard. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the drawer body; Step 2 grasp the handle for pulling; Step 3 pull the drawer to open.**
Goal: open(drawer)
Scene: chest_of_drawers, drawer, floor
Step 1: reach(chest_of_drawers)
  affordance_region: the front face of the chest of drawers
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, chest_of_drawers, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, chest_of_drawers) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(handle_of_drawer)
  affordance_region: the handle of the drawer
  contact: holding(handle_of_drawer) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(handle_of_drawer)
Step 3: pull(handle_of_drawer -> drawer)
  affordance_region: the handle of the drawer
  contact: holding(handle_of_drawer) [progress]
  spatial: distance(handle_of_drawer, drawer, >, 0.1) [completion]
  direction: pull_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(handle_of_drawer, drawer) > 0.1
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the front face of the chest of drawers
